posts.author: Natasha.Duggal (Natasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

As wrap text does not feed down to the front end sharable links can we have the widening of rows to feed-down?

What are you trying to achieve

This is to aid reporting to external viewers, reports are suppose to be easy for the viewer to follow, at the moment large texts are not fully visible unless you hover over.
